description: Robustness metrics along cost under (Iterated) Cut Attacks using the best cut in clusters (TODO: what we choose for ICA?). Content contains results for the attack type (CA or ICA), then the cuts parameters, then the diameter parameter for clustering, then the index of the used cluster of cuts (in decreasing order), then the ordering feature. Robustness metrics include LCC metric (for the whole attack) and efficiency (until edge 151).
